The '''Bakuran power station''' was located atop a dormant volcano in the mountains of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]].

==History==
In [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]], the power station was occupied by [[Imperial Remnant]] who sought to sabotage it by setting off explosive charges. The Imperials damaged the power plant during the initial takeover and also set up defensive [[Autoturret/Legends|autoturrets]] and [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-Webs]]. [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] apprentice [[Jaden Korr]] managed to [[Mission to Bakura (Disciples of Ragnos crisis)|infiltrate]] the station and stop its destruction while also encountering a [[Astromech droid/Legends|powerplant droid]].<ref name="JA" />

{{Struct-stub}}
